levels.descEn: Able to attack multiple enemy forces and have 80% chance to  disable the enemy from fighting back
levels.descTemplate: Able to attack multiple enemy forces and have %d%% chance to  disable the enemy from fighting back

levels.descEn: Able to attack multiple enemy forces and have 100% chance to  disable the enemy from fighting back
levels.descTemplate: Able to attack multiple enemy forces and have %d%% chance to  disable the enemy from fighting back

longDesc: Branche artillerie : portée, dégâts, pénétration. « Rocket Artillery » monte jusqu'au niveau 2. Effet maximum : « Able to attack multiple enemy forces and have 100% chance to  disable the enemy from fighting back ». Accessible dès le début de la recherche. À privilégier pour fracasser les villes défendues.
longDescEn: An artillery branch covering range, damage and penetration. "Rocket Artillery" scales up to level 2. Maximum effect: "Able to attack multiple enemy forces and have 100% chance to  disable the enemy from fighting back". Available from the start of research. Prefer it when you need to shatter defended cities.
longDescDe: Ein Artilleriezweig für Reichweite, Schaden und Durchschlag. „Rocket Artillery“ skaliert bis Stufe 2. Maximaler Effekt: „Able to attack multiple enemy forces and have 100% chance to  disable the enemy from fighting back“. Ab Forschungsbeginn verfügbar. Bevorzugt, wenn befestigte Städte geschliffen werden müssen.
